## 🎯 Objective
Investigate if `/api/v2/quiz` covers all monthly quiz functionality or if additional endpoints are needed.

## 📋 Tasks
- [ ] Audit all `/api/v1/monthly-quiz` endpoints
- [ ] Compare with `/api/v2/quiz` functionality
- [ ] Identify gaps between v1 and v2
- [ ] Document missing features
- [ ] Plan migration strategy
- [ ] Estimate implementation effort

## ✅ Deliverables
- Gap analysis document
- Migration plan with effort estimates
- Risk assessment
- Follow-up tickets for implementation

## ⏱️ Estimated Effort
**4 hours** (investigation only)
